log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Kalashtar — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:2+4=6 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.

══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Kalashtar — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:19+4=23 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Kalashtar — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Kalashtar — Bardic Musician
→ Bite: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 14] HIT! 16 damage. Kalashtar — Bardic Musician HP: 51/67
→ Bite: [d20:19+10=29 vs AC 14] HIT! 21 damage. Kalashtar — Bardic Musician HP: 30/67
→ Bite: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 14] CRITICAL HIT! 35 damage. Kalashtar — Bardic Musician HP: -5/67
